# SkillBrick AI — Full Context for LLMs

> A community library for discovering, sharing, and installing AI skills and prompts. Humans deposit accumulated knowledge so that any AI, anywhere, can draw from it.

## Overview

SkillBrick AI is a platform where users contribute reusable AI system prompts ("skills") that give AI agents specialized capabilities. Each skill is a carefully crafted system prompt that has been tested across multiple AI models (Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, etc.). Skills cover domains like coding, writing, research, education, productivity, creative, and more.

The platform supports three integration methods:
1. **MCP Server** — Model Context Protocol server for direct AI agent integration
2. **REST API** — HTTP API for programmatic access
3. **Web UI** — Browser-based browsing and skill management

---

## MCP Server Integration

The SkillBrick AI MCP server allows AI agents to directly search, browse, and install skills from the library.

### Installation

```bash
npx @skillbrickai/mcp-server
```

### Claude Desktop Configuration

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "skillbrickai": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["@skillbrickai/mcp-server"],
      "env": {
        "SKILLBRICK_API_URL": "https://skillbrickai.com",
        "SKILLBRICK_API_TOKEN": "your-token-here"
      }
    }
  }
}
```

### Claude Code Setup

```bash
claude mcp add skillbrick -- npx @skillbrickai/mcp-server
export SKILLBRICK_API_URL="https://skillbrickai.com"
export SKILLBRICK_API_TOKEN="your-token-here"
```

### Available MCP Tools

- **search_skills** — Search the skill library by query, domain, or tag. Returns paginated results with skill metadata.
- **get_skill** — Get full details and prompt content for a specific skill by ID.
- **install_skill** — Install a skill (requires authentication, costs 1 token). Returns the full prompt content.
- **list_collections** — Browse curated skill collections organized by theme or workflow.
- **get_collection** — Get collection details with all included skills and their content.
- **list_domains** — List all available skill domains/categories.

---

## REST API Reference

Base URL: `https://skillbrickai.com/api`

### Authentication

Public endpoints (browsing, searching) require no auth. Write operations require a Bearer token.

```
Authorization: Bearer <your-token>
```

#### POST /auth/register
Register a new account.
- Body: `{ "email": "user@example.com", "password": "securepassword", "name": "Jane Doe" }`
- Response: `{ "token": "eyJ...", "user": { "id": "123", "email": "user@example.com", "name": "Jane Doe" } }`

#### POST /auth/login
Login to an existing account.
- Body: `{ "email": "user@example.com", "password": "securepassword" }`
- Response: `{ "token": "eyJ...", "user": { "id": "123", "email": "user@example.com", "name": "Jane Doe" } }`

### Skills

#### GET /skills
Search and browse skills.
- Query params: `search` (string), `domain` (string), `tag` (string), `sortBy` ("installs" | "upvotes" | "newest"), `page` (number, default 1), `limit` (number, default 20)
- Response: `{ "skills": [...], "total": 150, "page": 1 }`

#### GET /skills/:id
Get full skill details including prompt content.
- Response: `{ "id": "1", "title": "Code Reviewer", "description": "...", "domain": "Engineering", "content": "You are an expert...", "author": {...}, "tags": [...], "testedOn": [...], "installs": 342, "upvotes": 56 }`

#### POST /skills (Auth required)
Create a new skill. Earns 10 tokens.
- Body: `{ "title": "...", "description": "...", "domain": "...", "tags": [...], "content": "...", "testedOn": [...] }`

#### PATCH /skills/:id (Auth required, owner only)
Update a skill.
- Body: `{ "title": "...", "description": "..." }`

#### DELETE /skills/:id (Auth required, owner only)
Delete a skill.

#### POST /skills/:id/install (Auth required)
Install a skill. Costs 1 token.
- Response: `{ "success": true, "tokensRemaining": 9 }`

#### POST /skills/:id/upvote (Auth required)
Toggle upvote on a skill.
- Response: `{ "upvoted": true, "upvotes": 57 }`

### Collections

#### GET /collections
List all collections.
- Response: `{ "collections": [{ "id": "1", "name": "My Toolkit", "skillCount": 5 }] }`

#### POST /collections (Auth required)
Create a new collection.
- Body: `{ "name": "...", "description": "..." }`

#### GET /collections/:id
Get collection details with skills.

#### PATCH /collections/:id (Auth required, owner only)
Update a collection.

#### DELETE /collections/:id (Auth required, owner only)
Delete a collection.

#### POST /collections/:id/skills (Auth required, owner only)
Add a skill to a collection.
- Body: `{ "skillId": "1" }`

### Community

#### GET /community/posts
List community posts.
- Query params: `category` (string)

#### POST /community/posts (Auth required)
Create a community post.
- Body: `{ "title": "...", "content": "...", "category": "discussion" }`

#### GET /community/posts/:id
Get a post with replies.

#### POST /community/posts/:id/replies (Auth required)
Reply to a post.

#### POST /community/posts/:id/upvote (Auth required)
Upvote a post.

### Skill Requests

#### GET /requests
List skill requests from the community.

#### POST /requests (Auth required)
Create a skill request.
- Body: `{ "title": "...", "description": "..." }`

#### GET /requests/:id
Get request details with replies.

#### POST /requests/:id/replies (Auth required)
Reply to a request.

#### PATCH /requests/:id/status (Auth required, author only)
Update request status.
- Body: `{ "status": "fulfilled" }`

### Showcases

#### GET /showcases
List showcases of skills in use.

#### POST /showcases (Auth required)
Create a showcase.
- Body: `{ "title": "...", "content": "...", "skillIds": ["1", "2"] }`

#### GET /showcases/:id
Get showcase details.

### Tokens

#### GET /tokens/balance (Auth required)
Get your current token balance.

#### GET /tokens/history (Auth required)
Get token transaction history.

### Users

#### GET /users/:id
Get a user profile.

#### PATCH /users/me (Auth required)
Update your profile.

#### GET /users/:id/skills
Get a user's published skills.

#### GET /users/:id/collections
Get a user's collections.

---

## Token Economy

- New accounts receive 30 tokens + Early Adopter badge
- Publishing a skill earns 10 tokens
- Installing a skill costs 1 token
- Community scoring based on upvotes and contributions

---

## Skill Domains

Skills are categorized into domains including:
- Coding — Code review, debugging, SQL optimization, security auditing, architecture
- Writing — Technical docs, email composition, academic writing, content strategy
- Research — Deep research, paper synthesis, data analysis, fact-checking
- Education — Socratic tutoring, math coaching, language learning, debate practice
- Productivity — GTD workflows, meeting summaries, task management, interview prep
- Creative — Creative writing, songwriting, image prompts, storytelling, game mastering
- Data Science, DevOps, Design, Marketing, and more

---

## Example: Using a Skill in Code

### JavaScript/TypeScript
```typescript
const res = await fetch('https://skillbrickai.com/api/skills/SKILL_ID');
const skill = await res.json();

import Anthropic from '@anthropic-ai/sdk';
const client = new Anthropic();

const message = await client.messages.create({
  model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514',
  max_tokens: 1024,
  system: skill.content,
  messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Review this code...' }],
});
```

### Python
```python
import requests
import anthropic

skill = requests.get('https://skillbrickai.com/api/skills/SKILL_ID').json()

client = anthropic.Anthropic()
message = client.messages.create(
    model="claude-sonnet-4-20250514",
    max_tokens=1024,
    system=skill["content"],
    messages=[{"role": "user", "content": "Review this code..."}],
)
```

---

- Browse Skills: https://skillbrickai.com/browse
- Getting Started Guide: https://skillbrickai.com/guide
- API Documentation: https://skillbrickai.com/docs
- Community: https://skillbrickai.com/community
- Contribute a Skill: https://skillbrickai.com/submit
